body: {"base_rev":"09251c564b49d60a83b0af23d6f92be06418d852","classification":"blocked","detail":"mixed_commit_and_no_changes_rationale","rationale":"The attempt produced implementation evidence, but final verification is blocked by pre-existing out-of-scope `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` failures in `crates/axon-core/src/auth.rs` and `crates/axon-core/src/guardrails.rs`; targeted Nexiq acceptance checks reportedly passed, so retrying the same bead is unlikely to succeed until the lint baseline is fixed or explicitly authorized as scope.","recommended_action":"release_claim_mark_blocked","result_rev":"bc563353df1763dcaedd4cba3350ba8a9fbef67e","session_id":"eb-545bdc50","status":"execution_failed","suggested_amendments":[],"suggested_followup_beads":[{"title":"Fix Axon core clippy result_large_err baseline","description":"PROBLEM: consumer-workload beads cannot pass the repository verification gate because `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` fails outside their scope. PROPOSED FIX: reduce or box the large error type on the affected result paths while preserving public behavior. mixed_commit_and_no_changes_rationale
rationale: status: proposed
reason: cargo clippy -- -D warnings fails in out-of-scope Rust files before any commit can be made; failures are clippy::result_large_err in crates/axon-core/src/auth.rs and crates/axon-core/src/guardrails.rs, while the Nexiq runner changes are limited to the bead scope and pass the targeted acceptance checks. Operator action is needed to authorize an out-of-scope lint-baseline fix or rerun after that baseline is fixed.
